items.title: BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP ETFs bleed $4.4 billion over 13 sessions, only HYPE in green
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant outflow from major crypto ETFs indicates a potential liquidity crunch, impacting investor sentiment and positioning for SOL and other assets.

items.title: Solana Now Has Native Subscriptions & Allowances
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of native subscriptions and allowances enhances Solana's usability, potentially increasing ecosystem engagement and attracting more developers and users.

items.title: Solayer rolls out Solana-native onchain perps trading platform Margin Trade mainnet
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of a Solana-native onchain perps trading platform could boost trading volume and liquidity, strengthening Solana's position in the derivatives market.
